program.noItems: A ku na swilo swa nkambo okwaho. Engetela nkarhi wo sungula ehansi.

program.notes: Notsi yo koma eka vanhu va xirilo (hi ku tsakela)

gifts.title: Swilo swo nyikela
gifts.noItems: A ku na swilo swo nyikela okwaho. Engetela xilo xo sungula kumbe mufambiso wa mali.
gifts.addItem: Engetela xilo xo nyikela kumbe mufambiso wa mali

gifts.bankTransfer: Ku yima eka bangi (hi ku tsakela)
gifts.walletHolderName: Vito ra n'wini wa akhawunti (hi ku tsakela)

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.description: Hlawula swivandla leswi kombisiwaka eka fomu ra RSVP ra munhu wa xirilo. Swivandla leswi fihliweke a swi nge kombisiwi eka vanhu va xirilo.

companions.label: Vanhu vo famba na vona / Plus-one
companions.description: Pfumelela vanhu va xirilo ku engetela vanhu vo engetela.

dietary.label: Swilo swo dya / Swiphiqo swa swakudya
dietary.description: Hlengeleta vuxokoxoko bya swakudya, swilo swo alergi na swin'wana.

transport.label: Switsundzuxo swo famba / logisitiki
transport.description: Vanhu va xirilo va kombisa swilo swo famba, ku paka, kumbe ku fikelela.

message.label: Hungu eka ntlhambi
message.description: Hungu ro tsakela ra munhu wa xirilo.

rsvp.attendingToggle: Ku tiyisisa / ku nga tiyisisi — yi kombisiwa nkarhi hinkwawo
rsvp.companionsField: Xivandla xa vanhu vo famba na vona

contact.title: Kombela mfikelelo wa administrador
contact.subtitle: Rhumela vuxokoxoko bya wena naswona hi ta ku rhumela link hi imeyili leswaku u endla akhawunti ya administrador.
contact.name: Vito hinkwaro
contact.message: Hi byela hi ta xiendlakalo kumbe nhlangano wa wena
contact.enterOtp: Nghenisa khodi leyi rhumeriweke eka imeyili ya wena
contact.otpSent: Xikombelo xi amukeriwile. Languta imeyili ya wena.
contact.verified: Imeyili yi tiyisisiwile hi ku humelela.
contact.success: Inkomu. Hi ta ku rhumela link hi imeyili leswaku u endla akhawunti ya wena ya administrador.

hero.titleHighlight: ku xixima nkhuvu yin'wana na yin'wana
hero.subtitle: Vumba swirhumiwa swa xitirhisi swo saseka, lawula tinhlamulo hi nkarhi wa siku na ku nyika vanhu va xirilo nkarhi wo tsundzukiwa.

invite.message: "Ku va kona ka wena ku ta endla siku leri ri va ro hlawuleka. Tiyisisa ku fikela 30 Ndzhati."
invite.footer: Xirhumiwa xa xitirhisi na RSVP hi nkarhi wa siku

access.title: Vafambisi na Vahleli
access.description: Nkhuvu yi lawuriwa hi vafambisi va pfumelelwa. Loko u ri muhleli wa nkambo u lava ku fikelela, kombela akhawunti ya wena.
access.note: Ntsena vafambisi va pfumelelwa va nga fikelela xikongomelo. Kombela akhawunti ya wena hi e-mail.

features.title: Hinkwaswo leswi u swi lavaka eka nkambo wa wena
features.subtitle: Xitirhiso lexi heleleke lexi langutelaka hinkwaswo, ku sukela eka xirhumiwa ku ya eka tiyisiso.

digitalInvites.title: Swirhumiwa swa xitirhisi
digitalInvites.desc: Design leyi lulamisekaka hi muvala, xitirhiso na xitayela xa nkambo wa wena. Link yo yexe eka munhu un'we un'we.

guestManagement.title: Nhlengelo wa vanhu va xirilo
guestManagement.desc: Engetela, lulamisa na ku lawula vanhu hinkwavo va xirilo. Lawula lava tiyisiseke kumbe lava a va ngati.

rsvpRealTime.title: RSVP hi nkarhi wa siku
rsvpRealTime.desc: Landzela tinhlamulo hi ku hatlisa, lawula vanhu vo famba na vona na swiphiqo swa swakudya.

giftList.title: Nhlengelo wa swilo swo nyikela
giftList.desc: Vumba nhlengelo wa swilo swo nyikela na ku nyikela mali hi IBAN, M-Pesa na xitirhiso xa bangi.

eventProgram.title: Nkambo wa nkambo
eventProgram.desc: Engetela nkarhi na mintirho ya muchato, cocktail, xilalelo na nkhuvu.

tableManagement.title: Nhlengelo wa matafula
tableManagement.desc: Vumba matafula, veka vukoni na ku nghenisa vanhu va xirilo hi swivhuri.

multiChannel.title: Ku rhumela hi minandza yo tala
multiChannel.desc: Rhumela swirhumiwa hi SMS, WhatsApp kumbe e-mail. Ku rhumela switsundzuxo hi nkarhi.

visualCustom.title: Ku lulamisa xifaniso
visualCustom.desc: Muvala wo sungula na wo tshikilela. Xitirhiso xo nyama, xo basile kumbe xifaniso. Xitirhiso lexi lulamisekaka.

adminDashboard.title: Xikongomelo xa mufambisi
adminDashboard.desc: Xikongomelo lexi heleleke na tin'hlayo ta nkarhi wa siku: vanhu hinkwavo, tinhlamulo na nhlayo.

mapLocation.title: Mapu na ndhao
mapLocation.desc: Engetela URL ya Google Maps ku pfuneta vanhu va xirilo ku fika hi ku olova.

prioritySupport.title: Mpfuno wo sungula
prioritySupport.desc: E-mail na rinombi ra mpfuno ri le kona eka swivutiso hinkwaswo.

securityControl.title: Vusirheleri na ku lawula
securityControl.desc: Tokens yo yexe eka munhu un'we. Vafambisi vo tala eka nkambo un'we.

founderStory.title: Yi velekiwe hi ndhima ya ndyangu
founderStory.p1: Anderson Macuche u vumbile Nkhuvu endzhaku ka ku vona ndyangu wa yena wu langana ni swiphiqo eku lulamiseleki siku ra 50 ra kokwa wa yena.
founderStory.p2: Ku rhumela swirhumiwa, ku lawula tinhlamulo na ku lulamisa vanhu va xirilo swi ve xiphiqo lexikulu. Hi kona laha mianakanyo yi veleke kona: xitirhiso xa xitirhisi lexi endla nkhuvu yin'wana na yin'wana yi va yo olova, yo lulamileka na yo tsundzukiwa.
founderStory.p3: Nkhuvu i vito leri vulaka "nkhuvu" eka Xichangana, ririmi leri rhwelela swin'wana na swin'wana swa ndhavuko na ku hlanganisa mindyangu. A hi xitirhiso ntsena: i xitirho xo xixima minkarhi leyi nga ta tshama yi ri kona.
founderStory.quote: Ku nkhuvula i ku va swin'we. Ku olovisa i xikongomelo xa hina.

howItWorks.title: Xana xi tirha njhani
howItWorks.subtitle: Hi magoza manharhu yo olova, nkambo wa wena wu kuma vutomi bya xitirhisi

chooseTemplate.title: Hlawula template
chooseTemplate.desc: Hlawula eka switayela swo saseka na ku lulamisa eka xitayela xa wena

personalize.title: Lulamisa vuxokoxoko
personalize.desc: Engetela vuxokoxoko bya nkambo, ndhao, siku na nhlengelo wa swilo swo nyikela

shareTrack.title: Rhumela na ku landzela
shareTrack.desc: Rhumela link ivi u vone tinhlamulo hi nkarhi wa siku

testimonial.quote: Nkhuvu yi cincile hi ku helela maendlelo ya muchato wa hina. Swirhumiwa swi saseka naswona xitirhiso xa tinhlamulo xi ponse nkarhi wo tala. Hi yi khensisa eka mindyangu hinkwayo.
testimonial.author: Mariana & Rafael

finalCTA.title: Xana u lulamile ku nkhuvula hi ndlela yo tsundzukiwa?
finalCTA.subtitle: Sungula namuntlha. Vumba xirhumiwa xa xitirhisi xo fanela eka nkambo wa wena hi miniti yo koma.
finalCTA.footnote: Ku fikelela hi ku kombela • Mpfuno wo sungula

footer.description: Xitirhiso xo saseka xa vuchato na minkambo yo hlawuleka eMozambique. Thekinoloji na design yo xixima minkarhi yo hlawuleka.
